subject: ASAP: Backend Engineer – Java – Fintech
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from Bankry, a company in the fintech space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Backend Engineer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:
• Java
• Docker
• MySQL
• SQS

Practical details:
• Start: ASAP
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Stockholm (on-site)
• Rate: up to 1075 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Niklas Persson
Country Manager
Nexum Consulting
Tel: +46 70 012 34 56
